description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof in dark gray, featuring a combination of brick and light-colored siding on the exterior walls. The front facade includes a small covered entryway with steps, flanked by a bay window and several symmetrically arranged windows. A large attached garage with a white door is visible on one side, seamlessly integrated into the structure. The house is surrounded by a variety of trees, including both leafy green and purple-flowering types, suggesting a landscaped yard. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a simple, rectangular layout. The overall design is practical and typical of North American ranch-style homes, emphasizing functionality and curb appeal.
description: A single-story brick and siding house with a dark gable roof, attached garage, and landscaped yard with various trees. The front features a covered entryway and symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, bay window, attached garage, and several trees in the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the garage, simple wall with minimal windows, and surrounding trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main living area with multiple windows and a clear view of the brick facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window and the continuation of the gable roof, with trees framing the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, small porch, and a single front door flanked by windows
